_meta.description: R2B artist-name diagnostic: Usher (Contemporary R&B). Artist named in caption. 1 seed. Locked 2026-05-17.

captions.ace_step: Contemporary R&B song in the style of Usher, 92 BPM, smooth slow groove, layered synth pads, hip-hop drum programming, 808 sub-bass, male tenor with melismatic runs and falsetto, stacked harmonies, sensual yearning mood, polished urban production

lyrics:
[Intro]

[Verse]
Curtains still drawn when the sun came up
You were tracing letters on my chest
Saying something I was too tired to answer
Now I'm playing it back in my head

[Pre-Chorus]
And I should call but I keep waiting
For something I can't put into words

[Chorus]
You're the one I left for nothing
You're the one I lost for nothing
I had everything I wanted
And I traded it for nothing at all
You're the silence in the morning
You're the question in the evening
I had everything I wanted
Yeah I lost it all for nothing at all

[Verse]
I see your face in every crowded restaurant
Hear your laugh in every borrowed song
My pride is heavier than my pillow
But I'm too far gone to apologize

[Chorus]
You're the one I left for nothing
You're the one I lost for nothing
I had everything I wanted
And I traded it for nothing at all
